problem: Need explicit implementation order so Builder executes stack integration safely and in sequence.

evidence.risk: Parallel or out-of-order implementation increases schema/integrity drift risk.

required_change: Implement tickets strictly in this order: phase1 -> phase2 -> phase3.
Do not start phase2 until phase1 outbox result includes full pytest proof and acceptance tests passing.
Do not start phase3 until phase2 outbox result includes full pytest proof and acceptance tests passing.
After each phase, run one manual `mc_command --json` verification and include schema diff note (no breaking changes).
acceptance_tests: Outbox report for each phase references previous phase completion proof.
`PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q` shown as passing in each phase result.
No Telegram-facing schema break across phase boundaries.
constraints: Fail closed if dependency phase is incomplete.
